gradeDescription: B = I practiced consistent good behaviour.
whatIDidToday: played with as many buddies as possible
noteworthyComments:
Happy Tuesday! 🐾💛

Today we played as much as our little hearts allowed! We ran around non-stop and played with all our toys 🏃‍♂️🎾🧸 It was the best day ever!

We also practiced our downs, and guess what? We did AMAZING. Every time our humans asked, we flopped right down like the good pups we are (sometimes extra fast because… treats 👀🍪).

Now it’s time to rest our paws for tomorrow’s adventures
